LAW AND MOTION 302, ASSIGNEE GARY LOONEY'S MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMNT TO INCLUDE ADDITIONAL NAME OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR. PLAINTIFF-ASSIGNEE KEVIN LOONEY'S MOTION TO AMEND JUDGMENT TO INCLUDE ADDITIONAL NAME (ALIAS) OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR, FOR WHICH NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED, IS GRANTED. THE JUDGMENT ENTERED ON JULY 11, 2011 AND RENEWED ON MAY 29, 2018, SHALL BE AMENDED TO ADD AS A JUDGMENT DEBTOR TERRIANN MCVICAR. MOVING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE COURT'S RULING AND STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS NOT OPPOSED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN, CLERK: M. GOODMAN, NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

calendar.matters:
Motion To Amend Judgmnt To Include Additional Name Of Judgmnt Debtor
Off Calendar Aug-31-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

ASSIGNEE GARY LOONEY'S Motion To Amend Judgmnt To Include Additional Name Of Judgment Debtor

Plaintiff-Assignee Kevin Looney's Motion To Amend Judgment To Include Additional Name (Alias) Of Judgment Debtor, for which no opposition was filed, is GRANTED. The judgment entered on July 11, 2011 and renewed on May 29, 2018, shall be amended to add as a judgment debtor Terriann McVicar.

Moving party is required to prepare a proposed form of order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-02-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC., DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU'S Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions Granted. No opposition filed.
(Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.
